markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 521. Driver's Licenses & Certificates
##### § 521.2424 — Commercial Motor Vehicles

A court may not grant an occupational driver’s license for the operation of a commercial motor vehicle to which Chapter 522 (Commercial Driver’s Licenses) applies. This section does not prevent a person who has been issued a commercial driver’s license from obtaining an occupational driver’s license for the operation of a noncommercial motor vehicle.

*Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 386 (H.B.291), Sec. 2, eff. September 1, 2023.*
